title: DocuLint: Auto-checking code comment sync with external docs
description: A GitHub Action that parses code files for documentation links (e.g. references to Notion or Markdown files) and flags outdated documentation by comparing code edit timestamps with the documentation update timestamps.

title: Micro-agent CLI for local CI/CD debugging
description: A local terminal tool powered by a lightweight local model (like Llama-3-8B) that parses Bamboo or GitHub Actions build failure log files locally, isolates the exact failing script line, and proposes a git diff to fix it.

title: Zero-Config Self-Hosted Dashboard
description: A single-binary (Go/Rust) web application that scans local Docker sockets and network ports, automatically mapping and showing a gorgeous dashboard of all self-hosted services running in a home lab.

title: Git Commit 'Refactor' Explainer
description: A local hook that uses LLMs to convert git diffs into human-readable Changelog summaries in plain English, categorization tags, and updates a local README file dynamically.
